text.title: AI Plugin Ecosystem (Figma REST) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-plugin-ecosystem. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: CI shells out to a designer to run a plugin nightly; misses 3 nights / week.
Client hammers Figma at 200 req/min; org gets banned.
antipattern.fix: Implement token-bucket at 60 rpm + retry-after backoff.

antipattern.symptom: Bulk rename fails on 30 % of nodes; pipeline reports success.
Org-wide PAT leaks via CI env var; attacker downloads every file.
antipattern.fix: Issue per-file PATs with strict scope; rotate quarterly.
